title: Chapter 154
content:

I just had to make sure she wasn’t a spy first.

But not yet, the spell for that hadn’t yet been unlocked, so I could only use it at the expense of my own mana.

The problem was that the skills not executed by the system were uncertain.

It was like in a game. A skill once cast would either work or not. The same way with the system. The system would either make the skill work, ignoring most of the defenses, or it would fail. Mostly, it would work, though. That was why the system was reliable.

There was no middle ground.

But using it myself was different. Many factors, such as the opponent’s mana, mental strength, physical strength, difference in level, and more, would get in my way.

Better to wait for the system to either unlock it or buy it. I still didn’t have enough funds for that, though, and it was better not to take a risk.

That reminds me. I didn’t check the requirements for the third incorporation.

I looked at the maid beside me on the bed, and she had fallen asleep. Since I was up last night too, I decided to check it later and fell asleep beside her too, using her soft and heavy tits as a pillow.

Damn good pillows.

~~

I woke up to find the brunette maid next to me gone, leaving my sheets stained but dry by now.

While I had had my fun with the maid and the sexy BBW GILF in the morning, my lust was still spiking through the roof, although I couldn’t get hard to show that.

I could go visit Sandra or Martha, since it had been quite a while since I had had any action with them. The same went for Cassandra.

But, at the moment, the most crucial person for my plans was Zara. She was my ticket to the juicy heavens of Carlson’s wife and his daughter-in-law.

Not to mention, her corruption was still at only twenty-four percent, not too high for me to be an important enough person to her.

So, with my target set in mind, I left my room and made my way to Zara’s chambers.

It was almost evening, so the western wing had grown quiet. Most of the women had either returned to their duties or retired to their rooms.

Thankfully, I found Zara in her room, seated on the ornate wooden desk near the bookshelves, with several books of magic before her.

The black-haired milf was dressed in one of her elegant gowns, though the neckline had been loosened slightly, allowing her heavy breasts to strain against the fabric.

She looked up as I entered the room, her eyes gleaming with that familiar noble pose as she closed the book in front of her with deliberate grace.

“Jack,” She said, her voice smooth and steady as one would expect from her noble grace, “You’re early.”

I bowed, since I didn’t know whether I was talking to the submissive Zara or the noble Zara.

“Forgive me, Lady Zara.” I replied, “I was done with my training sooner than anticipated, so I couldn’t wait to visit you as soon as possible. Would you like me to return at a later time?”

“No.” Zara simply replied as soon as my question was finished, as if she had never asked the question in the first place.

“I also relieved your mother of her duties for the night and am done with my study. We can begin.”

Her reply was graceful, but there was a slight anticipation in her tone.

She wasn’t far from drowning in my net.

“Before we begin, Lady Zara.” I said as I made my way to her, “Do you want me to address you as Lady Zara tonight? Or just Zara?”

I paused before saying the last bit. She did too. She looked at me, and then leaned back slightly in her chair, pushing her chest out…

“Just Zara.”

[Corruption]

So submissive one, huh?
